verses.text: Jerusalem khuasungah kileh kawikawi un. Khuadak un la en dih un! A thuman gamtat leh thuman a zong mi khat beek na mu uh hiam, zong dih un. Na muh uh leh tua khua' mawhna ka maisak ding hi
“ Topa a nuntak bangin,” ci-in a kiciam uh hangin a zuaupi uh ahi hi

Topa aw, nangmah in thuman en gige hilo na hi hiam? Nangmah in amaute na sat hangin a awlmawh tuan kei uh hi. Na sukgawp hangin na thuhilhna a ngai tuan kei uh hi. Amaute' maitang suangtum sangin sakzaw a, a kisik nuam kei uh hi
Tua ciangin keimah in, “Hih mite mihai hi a, a hehpihhuai ahi hi. Topa' lampi theilo uh a, amau' Pasian' deihna a thei kei uh hi

Miliante kiangah pai-in ka va kiho ding uh hi. Amaute in Topa' lampi thei uh a, amau' Pasian' deihna thei uh hi,” ci-in ka ngaihsun hi. Ahih hangin a vekpi-un ka uk ding nial khin uh a, ka hakkol kuaitanin ka henna khaute sutat khinzo uh hi

Tua ahih manin tulak panin humpinelkai in amaute that ding a, sehnel gam panin keivom in amaute a petgawp ding hi. Kamkei in a khuapite uh limtakin vil gige a, a pusuakkhia peuhpeuh balzan gawp ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute' mawhna tamlua a, hong taisan mun lua uh hi

“Na mawhnate uh hong koici maisak thei ding ka hi hiam? Na tate un kei hong nusiazo uh a, pasian ahi lopite peuh tawh kiciamzo uh hi. Amaute a gilvah dong uh an ka vak khit ciangin amaute in angkawmin, numei paktatte' inn-ah a hon om uh hi
Sakol gilvah a lante bangin a inn vengte' zite uh nehin a tau huthut uh hi
Hih thute hangin amaute gim pialo ding ka hi hiam? Topa in ka genin-ah, hici bang minam tungah thukkiklo ding ka hi hiam
A gualin a kisuan a leenggah huan sungah pai in la, suksiat sak in; ahi zongin sukmai mangsak sam kei in. A hiangte heuhkhiatsak in; bang hang hiam cih leh tua a hiangte Topa-a' hilo hi
Israel minamte leh Judah minamte, Topa in ka cihin-ah, kei' tungah hong thuman nawn hetlo uh hi
“Amaute in Topa hong nial uh a, ‘Amah in bangmah hihlo ding hi. Eite tungah siatna hong tunglo ding a, gal ahi zongin kial ahi zongin i thuak kei ding hi
Kamsangte lah huih bang hi lel uh a, a sung uhah thu tenglo hi. Amau' gen bangun amau mah in a thuak ding uh hi,’ ci uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih manin Topa, Vanglian Pasian in hong hopih a, “Amaute, tu-a bangin kampau uh ahih manin na kam sungah mei bangin ka kuan'sak ka thute in sing tawh kibang hih minamte kangtum gawp ding hi

“En un, Israel minamte aw, Topa in kong cihin-ah, gamlapi panin note a hong sim dingin gam khat kong kuansak ding hi. Tua gam pen tanglai pekin a om khinsa, a hat mahmah, amaute' pau na theihloh uh gam khat ahi hi
Thal tawh a kap uh teh kaplum lianlian uh a, a vekpi-un galhang kim uh hi

Amaute in lo-a na ante uh leh na an huante uh hong gaihsak ding uh a, na tapate uh leh na tanute uh hong thahsak ding uh hi. Na tuuhon, na bawnghonte uh hong gaihsak ding uh a, na leenggah, na theigahte uh hong nek mangsak ding uh hi. Na muan' mahmah uh kulhpi tawh a ki-um na khuapite uh namsau tawh hong suksiatsak ding uh hi
“Ahih hangin tua bang hun ciang nangawnin, Topa in kong cihin-ah, note kong sumaimang khin sam kei ding hi

Na mipihte un, ‘Bang hangin Topa i Pasian in hih bangin ei' tungah hong bawl ahi hiam?’ a cih uh ciangin nangmah in, ‘ Topa nusia-in na gamsung uhah gamdang pasian-te' na na sep uh bangin, note' gam a hilo gamdangah, gamdang mite' na na sem ding uh hi,’ na ci ding hi,” hong ci hi
Jakob' suante' tungah gen in. Judah mite' tungah hih bangin ci in
“Ngai un, ngaihsutna a neilo mihaite aw, mit nei napi-in a mulote, bil nei napi-in a zalo mite aw

kei hong kihtalo na hi uh hiam, Topa in kong ci hi. Keima mai-ah linglo na hi uh hiam? Tuipi gei-a om sehnelte keima koih hi a, tui ka dalsak tawntung hi. Tuihualte in a lawhlawh hangin zo zolo uh a, a gin' zuazua uh hangin kantanzo tuanlo uh hi
Ahih hangin hih mite a lungsim uh khauhin kei hong langpan' zen uh hi. Hong kiheisan uh a, hong paisan uh hi
A lungsim sung uhah, ‘A huna guah hong zusak a, tukguah, khalguah hong pia a, anlak hun ding a hong sehsak den Topa i Pasian zahtak ni,’ a ci kei uh hi
Na khialhnate un hih na hoihte khaktan a, na mawhnate uh hangin tuate na taanlawh uh hi
“Ka mite' lakah migilote kihel uh a, vasa thangsiah bangin mite thangsiahin a man uh hi
Bawm sung dimin vasa a kikhum bangin khemna tawh a ngah uh vante tawh a inn uh a dim hi. Tua ahih manin amaute lianin hau mahmah uh a, thau-in a mai uh a zol hi
Gitlohna lamah a hun bek a theithei kei uh hi. Tagah mite' phattuamna ding khualloin thu a manlopi-in khen uh a, mizawngte' tungah thumanlo uh hi
“Hih thute hangin amaute gim pialo ding ka hi hiam, Topa in ka ci hi. Hih bang minam' tungah thukkiklo ding ka hi hiam, ka ci hi
A dipkuathuai, a patauhhuai thu khat gamsungah a piang khinzo hi

Kamsangte in thuman genlo uh a, siampite in zong amau' ut bangun a uk uh hi. Ka mite in phamawh salo sawnsawn uh hi. A tawpna hun hong tun' ciangin bang cih ding uh ahi hiam, Topa in ci hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi.
